name: essentials-claude-code
description: Multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code with deep planning, plan optimization with git-style revision tracking, bug investigation, code quality analysis (standard + LSP-powered), task-based iterative implementation with self-contained comprehensive tasks, and parallel file editing/creation capabilities. All agents upgraded with Core Principles, ReAct reasoning loops, reflection checkpoints, and comprehensive self-verification for maximum quality and reliability.
author: GantisStorm

plugins.name: essentials
plugins.description: Essential agents for Claude Code with systematic quality validation: planner, plan-builder (multi-pass revision with reflection), bug-scout (evidence-based investigation with ReAct loops), code-quality (11-dimensional analysis with reflection checkpoints), code-quality-serena (LSP semantic analysis with reflection), file-editor (quality-first execution with pre-implementation reflection), task-builder (comprehensive self-contained tasks with proper resume from tasks.json), and prompt-builder (iterative refinement with anti-pattern elimination). All agents feature Core Principles, reflection checkpoints, and comprehensive self-verification.
